+├── @shiro/rich-renderers-edit (edit-only aggregator, depends on rich-renderers)
+│   └── edit renderers + edit nodes + slash-menu + TldrawPlugin + EmbedPlugin
 └── @shiro/rich-ext-tldraw (whiteboard extension)
 
 @shiro/rich-diff (standalone diff viewer, depends on core)
@@ -66,6 +68,7 @@ RichRenderer (read-only display)          RichEditor (full editing)

+pnpm --filter @shiro/rich-renderers-edit build     # depends on rich-renderers
 
 # Dev playground (hot reload, all features)
 pnpm --filter @shiro/rich-editor-demo dev
@@ -182,13 +185,13 @@ Renderer components with edit-only heavy deps are split into static and edit var
 
 Packages without edit-specific heavy deps (`codeblock`, `image`, `video`, `gallery`, `linkcard`) do not need splitting.
 
-Aggregator configs in `@shiro/rich-renderers`:
-- `enhancedRendererConfig` (`config.ts`) — static renderers only, for `RichRenderer`
-- `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (`config-edit.ts`) — overrides Alert/Mermaid/Mention with edit variants, for `RichEditor`
+Aggregator packages:
+- `@shiro/rich-renderers` — static-only. `enhancedRendererConfig` (`config.ts`), for `RichRenderer`. No edit deps.
+- `@shiro/rich-renderers-edit` — edit-only. `enhancedEditRendererConfig` (`config-edit.ts`), for `RichEditor`. Depends on `@shiro/rich-renderers` for `enhancedRendererConfig` spread. Also re-exports edit nodes (`embedEditNodes`, `tabsEditNodes`), plugins (`EmbedPlugin`, `TldrawPlugin`, `SlashMenuPlugin`), and slash-menu utilities.
 
 **Split criteria**: Only split when the edit path imports heavy deps (`@shiro/rich-editor-ui` components, `lucide-react` icons) absent from the static path. If edit logic is just a boolean flag with no extra imports (e.g. CodeBlock's `editable` prop), splitting adds complexity with no bundle benefit.
 
-**Adding a new renderer with edit UI**: Create `FooRenderer` (static) and `FooEditRenderer` (edit) in the same package. Export both from `index.ts`. Add static to `enhancedRendererConfig`, edit to `enhancedEditRendererConfig`.
+**Adding a new renderer with edit UI**: Create `FooRenderer` (static) and `FooEditRenderer` (edit) in the same package. Export both from `index.ts`. Add static to `enhancedRendererConfig` in `@shiro/rich-renderers`, edit to `enhancedEditRendererConfig` in `@shiro/rich-renderers-edit`.

plans/sparkling-pondering-muffin.md:5:`@shiro/rich-renderers` is a pure re-export aggregator that bundles both static (read-only) and edit renderers into one package. The barrel `index.ts` re-exports everything, forcing consumers to pull in edit-only dependencies (DropdownMenu, Popover, presentDialog, lucide-react) even when they only need static rendering. Splitting into two packages enables true on-demand import.

## Step 4: `pnpm install` + Build + Lint

1. `pnpm install` — links new workspace package
2. Build `@shiro/rich-renderers` first (edit depends on it)
3. Build `@shiro/rich-renderers-edit`
4. Build `@shiro/rich-editor-shiro`
5. Lint modified files

## Step 5: Update `packages/CLAUDE.md`

Update the "Renderer: Edit / Static Split" section and the "Registration" table to reflect two separate aggregator packages.

## Shared Items

| Item | Location | Why |
|------|----------|-----|
| Types (`EmbedType`, `SerializedEmbedNode`, etc.) | `@shiro/rich-renderers` | Used by both paths; edit package depends on static |
| `TldrawNode` | `@shiro/rich-renderers` | Lexical node for deserialization in both contexts |
| `EmbedNode` / `embedNodes` | `@shiro/rich-renderers` | Base nodes for deserialization |
| `TabsNode` / `tabsNodes` | `@shiro/rich-renderers` | Base nodes for deserialization |
| `enhancedRendererConfig` | `@shiro/rich-renderers` | Edit config spreads from it |
| `style.css` | `@shiro/rich-renderers` | CSS is shared; no edit-specific styles in aggregator |

import type { RichEditorProps } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import { RichEditor } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
import { FloatingToolbarPlugin } from '@shiro/rich-plugin-floating-toolbar'
import { SlashMenuPlugin } from '@shiro/rich-plugin-slash-menu'
import {
  TableCellResizerPlugin,
  TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin,
} from '@shiro/rich-plugin-table'
import { TldrawNode } from '@shiro/rich-renderers'
import {
  embedEditNodes,
  EmbedPlugin,
  enhancedEditRendererConfig,
  tabsEditNodes,
  TldrawPlugin,
} from '@shiro/rich-renderers-edit'
import type { Klass, LexicalNode } from 'lexical'
import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
import { useMemo } from 'react'

const defaultExtraNodes = [TldrawNode, ...embedEditNodes, ...tabsEditNodes]

export interface ShiroEditorProps extends Omit<
  RichEditorProps,
  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes' | 'actions'
> {
  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>
  actions?: ReactNode
  selfHostnames?: string[]
}

export function ShiroEditor({
  extraNodes,
  actions,
  children,
  selfHostnames,
  ...props
}: ShiroEditorProps) {
  const mergedNodes = useMemo(
    () =>
      extraNodes ? [...defaultExtraNodes, ...extraNodes] : defaultExtraNodes,
    [extraNodes],
  )

  return (
    <RichEditor
      {...props}
      extraNodes={mergedNodes}
      rendererConfig={enhancedEditRendererConfig}
      actions={
        <>
          <SlashMenuPlugin />
          {actions}
        </>
      }
    >
      <FloatingToolbarPlugin />
      <TldrawPlugin />
      <EmbedPlugin selfHostnames={selfHostnames} />
      <TableRowColumnHandlesPlugin />
      <TableCellResizerPlugin />
      {children}
    </RichEditor>
  )
}
```
</details></tool-use>
